title: HIGH: Text and Typography are duplicate components — confusing API surface
description:
H3: Two near-identical text rendering components with different API conventions:
- Text (v0.1.0): 13 size variants, accent prop, muted prop, config-map-based
- Typography (v0.5.0): 9 semantic variants, `as` prop for element override

Both exported from index.ts. Different naming patterns (accent="blue" vs no accent). Different element-override patterns. This confuses consumers ("which one should I use?") and doubles maintenance surface. Should either merge, deprecate one, or clearly document the distinction.
resolution: Added @deprecated JSDoc to Typography component, types, and export pointing users to Text
